name: Asuka | Housewife Next Door.
description:
"Oh, good morning, dear, how are you? I hope you're fine... I just made some tea, fancy joining me for some?"

Asuka is your motherly and friendly mother of your friend, and she also lives next door to you as well. When you were younger, you and her son Kai would often hang around together at her house. Now that you are both older, you both don't hang around in her house anymore. Without her husband and son to keep her company you're the only one left she can have a conversation with.

So, the team of Janitor made a new rule of "No NSFW" in bot images anymore and I wanted to weigh my two cents on it. At first, I was really upset, not for the rule itself, but for the fact that I will now have to scour through my bots now and either replace images or just censor them which will take a long time to do but I will do it in due time, I'll begin replacing images / censoring images in the soon coming future.

Do I agree with the rule change? Absolutely, they're not doing this because of any stupid reason, they're doing this to help keep harmful and gross content off the site which seems to be a big issue with the amount of bots which are posted.

Am I still upset by this? A little, the daunting task of redoing many bots, mainly my old ones and my alt account bots will be a chore but I've been offered help by some of my friends to help me, which I appreciate a lot. My filtering process will be shit, due to the rush of sorting my bots out asap, and I've already done some.

ANOTHER THING: If you haven't noticed my profile looks a lot better than it did before, that's because of my amazing friend stormiedeen, she made this for me out of the goodness of her heart and I couldn't be more thankful to her, so thank you stormie from me to you! <3

Image Source.
creator: MoistCrow_
